Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Naraka Incarnation]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Crimson Vault ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 4''' — The Naraka Incarnation is not free.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 9''' — The Naraka Incarnation is located in Malachi's realm.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 23''' — The Naraka Incarnation's face is sculpted from crusty ash and hardened volcanic stone.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 23''' — The Naraka Incarnation has eyes that glow like hot coals.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 23''' — The Naraka Incarnation has hair made of flame.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 23''' — The Naraka Incarnation has a red-scaled draconic tail.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 23''' — The Naraka Incarnation is almost ten feet tall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 23''' — The Naraka Incarnation wields a hammer with an obsidian shaft and a head made of flame.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 23''' — The Naraka Incarnation was held in a prison.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 23''' — The Naraka Incarnation's voice sounds like an angry volcano.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 23''' — The Naraka Incarnation's chuckle sounds like gargling boulders.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 24''' — The Naraka Incarnation is ten feet tall with ashen skin and blazing hair.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 24''' — The Naraka Incarnation has a lizard-tail and wields a burning hammer the size of an oak tree.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 24''' — The Naraka Incarnation can smell Ragnarus.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 24''' — The Naraka Incarnation has orange eyes that glow like embers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 24''' — The Naraka Incarnation can regrow its severed hand from ash.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 24''' — The Naraka Incarnation has bat-like wings of ash.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 24''' — The Naraka Incarnation can blast intense waves of fire from its palm.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 24''' — The Naraka Incarnation uses a hammer.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 24''' — The Naraka Incarnation's body dissolves into ash upon death.}}

== City of Light ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 2''' — The Naraka Incarnation was released and tore Bel Calem to pieces.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 4''' — The Naraka Incarnation burned much of Bel Calem and Myria.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 10''' — The Naraka Incarnation burned down a village.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 19''' — A Naraka Incarnation once burned an entire city block in Bel Calem to the ground.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 26''' — Becoming a Naraka Incarnation is more difficult than becoming an Elysia Incarnation.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
